summary: End-to-end frontend verification of the new CBMMG homepage cards and the two new detail pages (cbmmg-soldado.html, cbmmg-tenente.html). All 7 acceptance criteria from the review request pass.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor inconsistency between spec and implementation: the review request mentions sessionStorage flag 'idecan_has_cadastro'='1' for the 'already cadastrado' flow, but /app/frontend/public/assets/login-modal.js (function hasCadastro) actually checks for sessionStorage.idecan_cadastro containing a JSON object with nome+cpf. With the real key the flow works correctly and redirects to /inscricao-passo2.html. Just confirm the cadastro flow in inscricao.html sets sessionStorage.idecan_cadastro accordingly (it does — verified, this is how quadro-geral and the other editais already work).

CSP on cbmmg pages blocks an unrelated Cloudflare beacon script (static.cloudflareinsights.com/beacon.min.js). It does NOT affect functionality (auth.js, login-modal.js, tracker.js all load with HTTP 200 and execute). If desired, the CSP script-src can be extended with https://static.cloudflareinsights.com, or the beacon reference can be stripped from the imported HTML to remove the console noise.
Multiple .bak backup files (idecan.html.bak, .bak2 ... .bak5, meus-concursos.html.bak) are still present in /app/frontend/public — recommend removing them from the production build.
test_credentials: Not needed for the candidate flow. Admin credentials are in /app/memory/test_credentials.md.
seed_data_creation: Used sessionStorage.idecan_cadastro = {nome:'Joao Teste', cpf:'12345678909'} to simulate a registered candidate.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Playwright assertions passed: home shows 2 cards + correct title and no old cards; clicking the soldado card opens /cbmmg-soldado.html (correct EDITAL Nº 10, R$ 4.562,30, 321 vagas, R$ 106,00) and tenente opens /cbmmg-tenente.html (EDITAL Nº 09, R$ 7.506,80, 21 vagas, R$ 230,00); document.title on every page equals the IDECAN title; the two btn-inscricao-online on each page open data-testid='login-modal' when not cadastrado; modal contains CPF, Senha, link-cadastro, link-recover, login-submit (text 'Avançar'); link-cadastro navigates to /inscricao.html?edital=cbmmg-soldado (or cbmmg-tenente) and sets sessionStorage.idecan_edital correctly; when sessionStorage.idecan_cadastro is set with nome+cpf, clicking the button redirects directly to /inscricao-passo2.html (default fall-through, as expected for these new editais).
